prompt_inputs.goal: Prepare for 200m freestyle competition in 5 days with two daily training sessions (morning and evening)

solution_criteria: Plan includes specific meal timing around both morning and evening training sessions
Hydration strategy addresses fluid intake during and between training sessions
Protein intake is specified with timing for recovery between dual daily sessions
Plan is presented in concise, single-day format without excessive detail
task_description: Write a compact, consise 1 day mean plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a competitive swimmer preparing for a specific event, needing a concise plan that addresses hydration, protein recovery timing, and energy demands for multiple daily training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Build lean muscle while maintaining CrossFit performance across varied WOD intensities
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Dairy intolerance; prefers meals requiring minimal prep (max 30 min total daily cooking)

solution_criteria: Provides 5-6 balanced meals/snacks with macros supporting strength and endurance
All meals are dairy-free and require ≤30 minutes total preparation time
Meal timing aligns with typical CrossFit training schedule (morning, post-workout, evening)
task_description: Write a compact, consise 1 day mean plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a recreational CrossFit enthusiast who requires a balanced macro meal plan that accommodates varied workout intensities and includes meal prep efficiency constraints

prompt_inputs.goal: Prepare for marathon race with a 20km long run training session scheduled for 10:00 AM

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes at least 3000+ calories with 55-60% from carbohydrates to support endurance training
Pre-run meal (2-3 hours before 10:00 AM) and post-run recovery nutrition are specifically timed and detailed
All meals comply with stated dietary restrictions (lactose-free, nut-free)
Plan is presented in a compact, easy-to-read 1-day format
task_description: Write a compact, consise 1 day mean plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) who needs a high-calorie, carb-focused meal plan with specific timing around long training sessions
